Derek, it's Sunday evening and we’re coming up on our very first fundraising deadline of the campaign. So I’ll be direct: ******[Can you please chip in any amount to help us hit our donor goal before midnight?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYsh-oocRVXbvFb-879bdHd8hygum2Hm9o1sM61t-GMkYV__8mjZuBO_3ZttOV42Sj07VU3OOHf4b6ojEg7a7w6sQEHZlIkFU3rLC0upNAdq6OhRDzefAHGBeh3VClVzKhEiCz4lWpBnpdnpSZNtKrvZigsZh8wPcayGEDlTetUImg5pNUM4MGxiIjSdsFGyT7fVYa9s7WfX-WIeSUm5rsdlRdMZttuPQB44sdyyV1HHzDhEFLB9RoVsryHbuixR_A/37p/69RVVDtuQh-GSQe7TyD0kA/h1/uQYD_2Q0e8x_lqkY88h8KvxaYxoW4WnV7cM6pQAeV8A)** If you're like me, you’re probably watching football, eating dinner, or taking the dog out for a walk. (good boy, Troop) I know nobody _likes_ to get an email asking for a donation while you enjoy your last few hours of the weekend. But here's why I’m asking anyway: **The future of Virginia is on the line and I need you in this fight with me.** Donald Trump may be a one-term president but don’t tell that to the Virginia GOP. They want to keep Trumpism alive and well in the Commonwealth. Right now, we're at a crossroads. We can fail and let Republicans take us backward. Or we can enact big, bold change and lift up our public schools, invest in our communities, and ensure affordable health care access for all. As of right now, over 2,764 grassroots supporters have stepped up and become Founding Donors to our campaign. It's a great start, but we're still shy of our goal of bringing in 2,876 new donors before midnight. **You can click this link to donate:[secure.actblue.com/donate/terry/foundingdonor-goal](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOYsh-oocRVXbvFb-879bdHceQIWG7zSx4dElQGKsh3oaO6qZnpJN7KWZKOex8p3jG3THsMde5ET2KFJft3i0reZZQb8mav9XfCA9zFPu3kDORgy5skbP3eznlYHQI7JRX88dO3SZ2Ip9sAGx0Cb1tz8Um6K6HFKvhfWyvLFNdd478t2j3a2uOKKA6dowYxXPMtJriCsvjCzVS96_Ish5HNRhKpWUGPpD_H7yTKCZlgofNuKUU8sz1TJ9ZHHvlTsFbg/37p/69RVVDtuQh-GSQe7TyD0kA/h2/b_A6x_SGeeMXSrMT3CmEEz1pd99UvE-TG2NW2s0bd7I)****** Thanks for all you've done, Terry

name: NDTC
subject: Running for office, made easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
like, super easy
| | | | |
---
| | | | Peter, if you’re looking for an “easy” time in your life to run for office, you’ll never find it.

You’ll always be able to find a million reasons why you just can’t do it.

But here’s one you won’t be able to say:

“There are too many things to do and I don’t know how or when to do them”.

Peter — We’ve handled the hard stuff, now all you have to do is commit to doing it.

[Sign up for our 30-Day Challenge NOW, and we’ll send you one simple task every day in January to help YOU lay the groundwork to run a successful campaign.](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiZGpocmFqZm1laW5jaWtsMHZuc2YiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9uZHRjLTMwLWRheS1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9TkRUQ1x1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWxcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MzBkY1x1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: SENATORS LOEFFLER, PERDUE CALL FOR TRANSPARENCY FOLLOWING SECRETARY OF STATE'S FAILURE TO RELEASE LIST OF NEW REGISTERED VOTERS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, DECEMBER 14, 2020 SENATORS LOEFFLER, PERDUE CALL FOR TRANSPARENCY FOLLOWING SECRETARY OF STATE'S FAILURE TO RELEASE LIST OF NEW REGISTERED VOTERS
ATLANTA - Georgia Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue today are calling for the Georgia Secretary of State to compile and release a final list of newly registered voters following his failure to do so ahead of the start of early voting: "It's been one week since the voter registration deadline passed and the Secretary of State has failed to compile and release a final list of newly registered voters. This is totally unacceptable - the deadline for new voter registration was December 7, 2020. In-person early voting starts today, and the public remains without a full accounting of who is registered and who may attempt to cast a ballot in the runoff. This lack of transparency needs to be rectified immediately, or the integrity of our elections will remain threatened. Georgians demand transparency, accountability, and accuracy in our elections process - and the Secretary of State is failing to provide it in a timely manner."
###
Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001enMrXAGDfAHJD0EID11P6Nd6AgCOMl26DL6MJL-b-SMd95yuQ5WQQZQGMl47Z5u_DFpks2UCfDsKQR0oLCMO0v4S1lo92h-DNlsF2tNi7pTrv3GD30bQEeDvdUH_FVHo7dWBOsPg_ER7X8yEcnuh66QhYTVxSxbt&c=IEfzw_2XDd8FitqUNr4i3eoGPtWZ9SYgxVZXBkg6Sr7Mu3Ovgb12Vg==&ch=nIcI1Dh-agENxhUdD-IVH0W79hwsR7g2Gc1bJU2_SwdM90zb9mOd0A==)

name: Caitlin O'Dea (Team Kelly)
subject: ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS FOX NEWS TO DISCUSS STAKES OF HER RACE AS EARLY VOTING BEGINS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, DECEMBER 14, 2020 ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS FOX NEWS TO DISCUSS STAKES OF HER RACE AS EARLY VOTING BEGINS
ATLANTA - This morning, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler joined Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, and Brian Kilmeade on Fox & Friends to discuss what's at stake in her Senate runoff race as early voting begins in Georgia.
Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LRYw2atUeTqdb_uwfze2Bp7kbqBKoz1lMXAJFXsvQvLjBJeIX7e3xFHvL7UQ9QZydYMTqpUwX9wWwi3XAn7qe6AukiH6iZm6nvXe9_pRVAuUDsfcHtnz93y27bGCSCL3TvMBSO2Y1ALN4JX3GU_I6XAsiHFEw6Hyfv3wZvl56HOxaq4_O8g3mVGS2NQdX5kWUqQHPLKUCMw=&c=m5FaO9_jLDojDSBkW3LezME_B1h2M7RVSuiikbaU-bnbZrtcJbqc0Q==&ch=XHGdLZ-JVbG0Mt2nSUyJHmbyvoae_TpodnC_eiQzLuOPL4xaJ3aClA==) or on the photo below to watch the full interview:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LRYw2atUeTqdb_uwfze2Bp7kbqBKoz1lMXAJFXsvQvLjBJeIX7e3xFHvL7UQ9QZydYMTqpUwX9wWwi3XAn7qe6AukiH6iZm6nvXe9_pRVAuUDsfcHtnz93y27bGCSCL3TvMBSO2Y1ALN4JX3GU_I6XAsiHFEw6Hyfv3wZvl56HOxaq4_O8g3mVGS2NQdX5kWUqQHPLKUCMw=&c=m5FaO9_jLDojDSBkW3LezME_B1h2M7RVSuiikbaU-bnbZrtcJbqc0Q==&ch=XHGdLZ-JVbG0Mt2nSUyJHmbyvoae_TpodnC_eiQzLuOPL4xaJ3aClA==)
---
| View a transcript of the interview below:
SENATOR LOEFFLER: Early voting starts today here in Georgia. I'm urging all voters to get out, take President Trump's lead, get out and vote today for David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler. The President came here last week and urged voters to exercise their right, and it's vitally important that we do that because Georgia is the firewall to socialism. We have to hold the line here, not just for Georgia but the entire future of the country rests on these races and we have to hold the Senate majority...
You heard Chuck Schumer. He said, "now we take Georgia, then we change America." Georgians don't want to be taken by Hollywood or New York or Chuck Schumer. We're fighting for conservative values, American values here, trying to make sure we support our police, our military, open up our economy, get back to work - the things that Democrats are fighting against in Washington. Democrats have blocked relief time and again for hardworking families, and Hollywood is as out of touch as the liberals in Washington are. We have to keep fighting for hardworking Georgians to get past this pandemic and deliver relief. That's what David and I have fought for every day this year, and we're going to keep fighting for that.

---
| ###
Caitlin O'Dea Press Secretary [caitlin@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LRYw2atUeTqdb_uwfze2Bp7kbqBKoz1lMXAJFXsvQvLjBJeIX7e3xBjfQyu6vnWMxRJSwoCM1hTfl1bBn8oxQ3iaAtJ3CJigcwLkEsf2riCrTjW-b6G6zBZ2ADG5OVqdrxe23ZKhOp1QDYEHh9-D4dK-d2CvahCM&c=m5FaO9_jLDojDSBkW3LezME_B1h2M7RVSuiikbaU-bnbZrtcJbqc0Q==&ch=XHGdLZ-JVbG0Mt2nSUyJHmbyvoae_TpodnC_eiQzLuOPL4xaJ3aClA==)

Democrats have blocked relief time and again for hardworking families, and Hollywood is as out of touch as the liberals in Washington are. We have to keep fighting for hardworking Georgians to get past this pandemic and deliver relief. That's what David and I have fought for every day this year, and we're going to keep fighting for that. | ### Caitlin O'Dea Press Secretary == | Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075 | | Sent by mailto:caitlin@kellyforsenate.com powered by

Newt Gingrich recently said that Republicans have to turn out more votes than Stacey Abrams can steal in the Georgia runoff races. Please sign up below to help with that, and keep reading to see how you can continue to support President Trump’s efforts to stop the steal.

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._

GET OUT THE VOTE IN GEORGIA! SAVE THE SENATE!
[Please watch and share this explosive video compilation of the absentee ballot fraud that took place in Georgia.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQ5LTk2NmU1MGM4MzAxOTQxOTE4Zjc5ODZmYWQ3NjE1MDEx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS92M3p2aW9nNXpjMD9taWQ9NDMxMjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=mcq7_iO96osPYSxatgcI6g) You should share it on social media and email it to your network, and post on your website, if you have one. There is also a call to action at the end of the video for Georgians.

If you live in Georgia, please also take the step of calling your state legislators to demand they have the courage to appoint Trump electors now! You can go to [ProtectTheVote2020.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQ5LTk2NmU1MGM4MzAxOTQxOTE4Zjc5ODZmYWQ3NjE1MDEx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdC10aGUtdm90ZS8_bWlkPTQzMTIwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=MPkjJNEsAHjzrsbEFLpvmA) to find your state legislators. Help stop the steal today!

IF YOU LIVE IN PA, GA, MI, OR WI – CALL YOUR LEGISLATORS NOW
We don’t know what’s going to happen with the Texas lawsuit or any other legal challenges to the stolen election, but it wouldn’t hurt to start putting the pressure on these so-called Republican legislatures. There is a chance that the legislatures of these states will be the ones to choose the electors that will vote in the Electoral College. If that’s the case, we must flood their offices with the demand that they choose Trump electors based on the obvious fraud that occurred. We’ve already seen reports that some Republican legislators saying they are worried about doing the right thing because of threats of left-wing violence, so we need to start putting the pressure on them now. Legislatures may or may not be adjourned right now, but you can usually still speak to an admin or leave a message.
* Pennsylvania: [Find Your Legislator](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQ5LTk2NmU1MGM4MzAxOTQxOTE4Zjc5ODZmYWQ3NjE1MDEx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVnaXMuc3RhdGUucGEudXMvY2Zkb2NzL2xlZ2lzL2hvbWUvZmluZHlvdXJsZWdpc2xhdG9yLz9taWQ9NDMxMjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=OxchAb-5rvgki9WFZu6uEA)
* Georgia: [Find your Representative](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQ5LTk2NmU1MGM4MzAxOTQxOTE4Zjc5ODZmYWQ3NjE1MDEx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5ob3VzZS5nYS5nb3YvbWVkaWFTZXJ2aWNlcy9lbi1VUy9GaW5kWW91ckxhd21ha2VyLmFzcHg_bWlkPTQzMTIwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=B6eqvd19Mj6i5U89Mi09RQ) & [Find your Senator](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQ5LTk2NmU1MGM4MzAxOTQxOTE4Zjc5ODZmYWQ3NjE1MDEx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5zZW5hdGUuZ2EuZ292L3NlbmF0b3JzL2VuLVVTL0ZpbmR5b3VyTGVnaXNsYXRvci5hc3B4P21pZD00MzEyMCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=RVEuAI8ACj8KS2W4cm_-EQ)
* Michigan: [Find your Representative](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQ5LTk2NmU1MGM4MzAxOTQxOTE4Zjc5ODZmYWQ3NjE1MDEx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UubWkuZ292L01IUlB1YmxpYy9mcm1GaW5kQVJlcC5hc3B4P21pZD00MzEyMCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Q_zATy46Tyu_so09s827-w) & [Find your Senator](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQ5LTk2NmU1MGM4MzAxOTQxOTE4Zjc5ODZmYWQ3NjE1MDEx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLm1pY2hpZ2FuLmdvdi9meXNieWFkZHJlc3MuaHRtbD9taWQ9NDMxMjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=YDFzFJ4VphwI3A-b3-GLYg)
* Wisconsin: Find your Legislator

**Sample Script**
_Hello, my name is [Your Name], and I’m calling from [Your City, State] to demand that if, as according to Article II of the Constitution, the decision to assign electors falls to you, that you assign electors to President Trump, no matter what the threats are from the radical left. There is ample proof of massive fraud in targeted areas and states that stole the election, and allowing the fraud to stand will disenfranchise the tens of millions of legal, legitimate voters who will never again trust the integrity of our elections. Do the right thing if the decision ends up in the legislature, and assign electors to Trump. Thank you._
|
---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of December 14th
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

This week, as we are now in winter, it would be a good time to learn about the winter of 1777-1778 at Valley Forge, during the Revolutionary War.

There is a wonderful write-up and short, 4-minute video describing what that winter was like for the Continental Army that kids of many ages would find interesting linked below. Additionally, there is a longer, nearly 30-minute mini-movie about the winter at Valley Forge linked below, and again, would likely be interesting to kids (and adults!) of many ages.

The longer video is titled, “The Winter Patriots: A Revolutionary War Tale,” and is a good reminder of what so many patriots went through for liberty and freedom over the winter (and many years). We are in winter now, and we face an uphill battle, yet again, for liberty and freedom in America. Use this lesson to help your kids or grandkids (and yourself) to take heart and keep fighting.

[Valley Forge: Write-up and short video](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQ5LTk2NmU1MGM4MzAxOTQxOTE4Zjc5ODZmYWQ3NjE1MDEx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW91bnR2ZXJub24ub3JnL2xpYnJhcnkvZGlnaXRhbGhpc3RvcnkvZGlnaXRhbC1lbmN5Y2xvcGVkaWEvYXJ0aWNsZS92YWxsZXktZm9yZ2UvP21pZD00MzEyMCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Dk-zb1NYogEelGlOezwDmg)

[The Winter Patriots: A Revolutionary War Tale (Full Movie)](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQ5LTk2NmU1MGM4MzAxOTQxOTE4Zjc5ODZmYWQ3NjE1MDEx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1DYkdvZGowbEoyUSZtaWQ9NDMxMjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=kvWNiVQBz7HWh9SUg0PNpw)

And, for more fun, check out this very famous painting about that winter!

**The Prayer at Valley Forge (1976 painting)**

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzQ5LTk2NmU1MGM4MzAxOTQxOTE4Zjc5ODZmYWQ3NjE1MDEx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVwcmF5ZXJhdHZhbGxleWZvcmdlLmNvbS8_bWlkPTQzMTIwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=1eheTXeixZ_6Y1oaGnl7RA)

In liberty,

Jenny Beth

name: True the Vote
subject: How to Watch Electoral College Votes Live Today
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=336A763A20A3525)
---
| | HOW TO WATCH ELECTORAL COLLEGE VOTES LIVE TODAY

Today, December 14, the 538 electors who make up the Electoral College will meet in all 50 states and the District of Columbia to cast their ballots for the next president and vice president of the United States. Most electors from each state will go to their respective state capitol buildings to cast ballots at the time specified by state law.

Most states provide free access to live streams. You can visit your [state website](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnBvc3QuY29tJTJGcG9saXRpY3MlMkZpbnRlcmFjdGl2ZSUyRjIwMjAlMkZlbGVjdG9yYWwtY29sbGVnZS12b3RlLXRyYWNrZXIlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=336A763A20A3526) and look for the live stream, usually offered by the state legislative body. You can also watch [live coverage](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuYy1zcGFuLm9yZyUyRnNjaGVkdWxlJTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=336A763A20A3527)[ on C-SPAN](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuYy1zcGFuLm9yZyUyRnNjaGVkdWxlJTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=336A763A20A3527) of the Electoral College votes in several key battleground states. The coverage began at 10 am ET with Indiana. Depending on the state, most votes will happen between 11 am and 2 pm local time. A few states do not have set times for ballots to be cast.

---
| | | | All times are local.

* Alabama: Noon
* Alaska: 11 a.m.
* Arizona: 2 p.m.
* Arkansas: 10 a.m.
* California: 2 p.m.
* Colorado: Noon
* Connecticut: Noon
* District of Columbia: No time set
* Delaware: No time set
* Florida: Noon
* Georgia: Noon
* Hawaii: 2 p.m.
* Idaho: Noon
* Illinois: 10 a.m.
* Indiana: 10 a.m.
* Iowa: No time set
* Kansas: Noon
* Kentucky: Noon
* Louisiana: No time set
* Maine: 2 p.m.
* Maryland: No time set
* Massachusetts: 3 p.m.
* Michigan: 2 p.m.
* Minnesota: Noon
* Mississippi: No time set
* Missouri: 2 p.m.

---
| | |

* Montana: 2 p.m.

* Nebraska: 2 p.m.
* Nevada: 2 p.m.
* New Hampshire: Noon
* New Jersey: 3 p.m.
* New Mexico: 11 a.m.
* New York: Noon

* North Carolina: Noon
* North Dakota: 1 p.m.
* Ohio: Noon
* Oklahoma: 10 a.m.
* Oregon: No time set
* Pennsylvania: Noon
* Rhode Island: Noon
* South Carolina: 11 a.m.
* South Dakota: Noon
* Tennessee: No time set
* Texas: 2 p.m.
* Utah: Noon
* Vermont: No time set
* Virginia: Noon
* Washington: Noon
* West Virginia: No time set
* Wisconsin: Noon
* Wyoming: Noon

---
| | KEY DATES BETWEEN NOW AND INAUGURATION DAY

**Dec. 23 -**********Electoral votes must arrive on Capitol Hill:** The USPS has nine days to deliver the certified electoral votes from their states to the Senate in Washington, DC.

****** **Jan. 3 -****New Congress sworn in:** Members of the House and Senate take the oath of office at noon in the official start of the 117th Congress.

**Jan. 6 -****Electoral votes counted:** Members of the House and Senate meet in the House chamber. Vice President Mike Pence in his role as president of the Senate presides over the session and the electoral votes are read and counted in alphabetical order by two appointees each from the House and Senate. They give their tallies to Vice President Pence, who announces the results. If there are objections, the House and Senate consider them separately to decide how to count those votes. There are 538 electoral votes: one for each congressman and senator plus three for Washington, DC. If no candidate gets 270 votes, the 435 members of the House decide the election. The House has until noon on January 20 to pick the president and each state gets a vote. If they can't, it becomes the vice president or the next person in the line of presidential succession.

**Jan. 20 -****Inauguration Day:** A new president takes the oath of office at noon. In a disputed election, if the House has not chosen a president but the Senate has chosen a vice president, the vice president-elect becomes acting president until the House makes a choice. And if there's no president-elect and no vice president-elect, the House appoints a president until one is chosen.

And if there's no president-elect and no vice president-elect, the House appoints a president until one is chosen. | | | | | | | | Join the conversation on social: | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved | | True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

name: Caitlin O'Dea (Team Kelly)
subject: ICYMI: BLACK PASTORS SLAM WARNOCK'S SUPPORT FOR ABORTION-ON-DEMAND
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, DECEMBER 14, 2020
> ICYMI: BLACK PASTORS SLAM WARNOCK'S SUPPORT FOR ABORTION-ON-DEMAND
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, more than two dozen black pastors recently signed onto a [letter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g7ELS3-CoGCQhnEMWXXWKZRfMZ1nPOSh7yAlmzcQPDEhN18VJJIHf9C2JW4O785io3_7g74emXPICBlOQu90MT9_1AA2wZHto-pwa_x8iR5CpsynnaIRhjjaR15hJi9lSfRwji-yGHNEHOzEXbpUXuPVdBJgPsryHFt3mUr9srGJQwXyJWPDI9f6vtw8gIWQlvz7S774VXyq6Sw_RmqicFdp3hjOsApmw2Lq0mQ0GRYRcGlWUVv34Q==&c=kLBheigo_8eumR_hV9TOohfTV1EoAnR-gqXUd3xeiOkV6IpBBQyYIg==&ch=motkV99rOQks3Bv9yGayg5KW0sl_43XfOuBvIt2OBep0H2GErumUVA==) condemning Radical Raphael Warnock's support for taxpayer-funded [abortion-on-demand](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g7ELS3-CoGCQhnEMWXXWKZRfMZ1nPOSh7yAlmzcQPDEhN18VJJIHfzaFoNOtE63znt7WIgy3jDjMBLWy4Dwo2XxuxqP8T7nH8Mz11r016twOt3NiOo0w1bhSOfyYO9s5aCuuDIS1cIKI1_NXg0bT5lQLdfE7b6OQD8RUYrR5mKsFuKWkvPTHx3_dGS_UNYNAAfHZrCmxonOMyeFOhciEefj5bSjFv1QmRLHknXCHllyF46nFVwV1jpY1InJK5oAaKXLl6mU9yHCxuSz_33bfmubDrWCEmlfYCnEiuS4Bf0M=&c=kLBheigo_8eumR_hV9TOohfTV1EoAnR-gqXUd3xeiOkV6IpBBQyYIg==&ch=motkV99rOQks3Bv9yGayg5KW0sl_43XfOuBvIt2OBep0H2GErumUVA==). Warnock not only "[opposes](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g7ELS3-CoGCQhnEMWXXWKZRfMZ1nPOSh7yAlmzcQPDEhN18VJJIHfzaFoNOtE63znGqVDxk87bz2YSqcqht3qHUB4B5NlybJ_gn_0hoz6h8voFY16ainxzkFgdjhYfDYE3doGjg4a8rs0Pc_g4ruNR7CXkWTs65xUWtQxw73z-OmQ0xMC5oFAsMrn_ZUE4vILL5vOSCNtTtXHjtawo516LR2R_V0ISq-61-S1HlTVyMdVY8q5dqt82z1XfS7wrXS&c=kLBheigo_8eumR_hV9TOohfTV1EoAnR-gqXUd3xeiOkV6IpBBQyYIg==&ch=motkV99rOQks3Bv9yGayg5KW0sl_43XfOuBvIt2OBep0H2GErumUVA==) all abortion restrictions," he considers abortion to be a "[human right](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g7ELS3-CoGCQhnEMWXXWKZRfMZ1nPOSh7yAlmzcQPDEhN18VJJIHfzaFoNOtE63zIZkpwhvmfCyHW1VGrfZK7Gh6tdLWfkXzhc2YC-z2b1U11h_sle184xjFkPmHkna_4AgB-DECQvzTra7eoLbmYW6DTti3XgNGiXwQqsl-vOJzHU6pwuxcJu-P_AWebgEy8g5KjfYojpW_igPcGtUqo-GaIIiPFyAaQNqUodFlyvxA98M1Cd8s96RXsrcr5bv-V2tu8muV4NF_H1DyvC8BugEBT8qODmmHIM9t2B3mQEjtT5PwPD75N_t5C9myz_RI8sd-RabQ1Sg=&c=kLBheigo_8eumR_hV9TOohfTV1EoAnR-gqXUd3xeiOkV6IpBBQyYIg==&ch=motkV99rOQks3Bv9yGayg5KW0sl_43XfOuBvIt2OBep0H2GErumUVA==)" that is "consistent with [his] view as a minister."
In the [letter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g7ELS3-CoGCQhnEMWXXWKZRfMZ1nPOSh7yAlmzcQPDEhN18VJJIHf9C2JW4O785io3_7g74emXPICBlOQu90MT9_1AA2wZHto-pwa_x8iR5CpsynnaIRhjjaR15hJi9lSfRwji-yGHNEHOzEXbpUXuPVdBJgPsryHFt3mUr9srGJQwXyJWPDI9f6vtw8gIWQlvz7S774VXyq6Sw_RmqicFdp3hjOsApmw2Lq0mQ0GRYRcGlWUVv34Q==&c=kLBheigo_8eumR_hV9TOohfTV1EoAnR-gqXUd3xeiOkV6IpBBQyYIg==&ch=motkV99rOQks3Bv9yGayg5KW0sl_43XfOuBvIt2OBep0H2GErumUVA==), the pastors wrote, "[Raphael Warnock has] a duty to denounce the evil of abortion" and "[his] open advocacy is a scandal to the faith and to the black community."
[Fox News](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g7ELS3-CoGCQhnEMWXXWKZRfMZ1nPOSh7yAlmzcQPDEhN18VJJIHf9C2JW4O785iL90xHTO3Gfx5G7B7QHwpgIPDwSSqHNyflcsFvSJzULXnrrdek5RDqLls87o4UvymESuqXCaR2qXZQ5To3Q6CZfToYKmkIZvk5t9_uUBrntz9CYj3eAM0eTysjF8rPvlKP-HWj2mtH_H1CFHQJNttIg==&c=kLBheigo_8eumR_hV9TOohfTV1EoAnR-gqXUd3xeiOkV6IpBBQyYIg==&ch=motkV99rOQks3Bv9yGayg5KW0sl_43XfOuBvIt2OBep0H2GErumUVA==): "Over 25 Black Ministers Sign Letter to Warnock on Abortion"
[New York Post](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g7ELS3-CoGCQhnEMWXXWKZRfMZ1nPOSh7yAlmzcQPDEhN18VJJIHf9C2JW4O785igZ4J6I3l5hbdEfqGIP4z2ibQY6DLSq2R4IIAqJzh_6MCrOgXuG6IJ6ipCsUHUtw9oZOAs2DXOhWFDIMMsUwQfGXPykRnFNaTnkFlKC9Cfue95WruiIa4rDR-DOJEWGJ1y94J2UpHP5tgt5jFKNhflml3bMmmg1rd4gH4z3RqZFLzhmVrracZHg==&c=kLBheigo_8eumR_hV9TOohfTV1EoAnR-gqXUd3xeiOkV6IpBBQyYIg==&ch=motkV99rOQks3Bv9yGayg5KW0sl_43XfOuBvIt2OBep0H2GErumUVA==): "Rev. Warnock Slammed by Black Georgia Ministers over Abortion Stance"

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ViKJZIPj6a_zHpXaDyD2AscOzBT2cYZJqxVGWPVb2osxl7RDzkfwyC4dTfE9AsYTocXngaqU3FIKp_1p9kR6lF5ravTSEAFnJqe_tJHe1pRaQoaIO9uF_YDd_ab0uerNxEZpXlZq97I=&c=J-GyhYpmVf5c-ex0Obf2I0elQQRBWY0seIiN5IW0fpcitKQWO4ShSQ==&ch=XPxRru0J4ErPNoKsaWKF5P5YHMXucPLSJVDUEnnQ-nRu2HjtyLr45A==).

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: Our CRITICAL upcoming deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
I just ran the numbers ahead of tomorrow's CRITICAL mid-month deadline, and we're currently SHORT of where we need to be if we have ANY hope of keeping Georgia and the Senate RED on January 5th. In order to do just that, we activated EMERGENCY 5X MATCHING through 11:59 PM TOMORROW. That's right. ANY SIZED contribution will have 5X the impact in our fight to REACH our goal, KEEP Georgia RED, and PROTECT your Republican-controlled Senate.
**FROM:** Mitch McConnell
**SUBJECT:** Tomorrow's CRITICAL deadline

Join the elite group of Trump State Defenders!
Friend,

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. name: Mary Mancini
subject: corrupt fools
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Here’s the deal, plain and simple. We have less than 48 hours to reach the critical benchmark of $10,000. With a 100% match activated on all gifts towards our 4D (December Democratic Donor Drive) goal of $20,000 – we just can’t afford to miss out on this opportunity.
A Fox News poll just showed that over 65% of Republicans believe the results of the election are fraudulent. We are at a time where faith in our very Democracy is at stake, yet GOP leadership chooses to stoke fear and mistrust instead of restoring confidence in the American political system. Tennessee AG Slattery’s decision to back the absurd and unconstitutional Texas lawsuit, meant to suppress hundreds of thousands of votes, is just another example of this. Thankfully Tennessee Democrats are fighting back. Here’s what they had to say:
House Minority Leader Karen Camper said, “it’s disappointing that with all the pressing issues facing the state...crucial matters like fighting off the pandemic, getting our children back in school, stimulating the economy for small businesses and putting people back to work...that we are choosing to waste time on a decided election.”
House Caucus Chair Vincent Dixie added, “People are dying, losing jobs and homes and Governor Bill Lee feels it’s appropriate to waste our tax dollars defending a lost cause. It’s time to unite Tennesseans not divide us by undermining democracy.”
Senate Minority Leader Jeff Yarbro also weighed in, “This is embarrassing and marks a low point in the history of the office of the Tennessee Attorney General... Here's the context: The Attorney General in Texas is under FBI investigation and widely assumed to be fishing for a pardon. Now the Tennessee Attorney General is spending Tennessee resources to help!?! Plus-notably shoddy legal work. And-the goal is interfering in how states run elections, fighting democracy, or both.”
The TNDP is fighting with all our grit to support and elect reasonable and responsible leadership in Tennessee. We need all the help we can get, and right now that means taking advantage of this incredible matching opportunity.
Will you help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Let's Have Jane's Back
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=let_s_have_jane_s_ba&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Politicians will meet today at the Capitol and likely pass the Governor Walz Shutdown Bailout bill with your tax money. Weak kneed Republican Senators continue to let us down and they REFUSE to stand up to our Tyrannical Governor.** While true courage and leadership is rarely found in St Paul, one can see shining examples of it across Minnesota. You're familiar with Larvita who opened up her restaurant in Lynd, MN in defiance of the Governor. Despite threats from the state, she refused to give in. She's a hero in my mind. We also have a hero up in East Grand Forks. Her name is [Jane Moss and her Boardwalk Bar & Grill](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALnQSf4UD6mN62aoi0s7mkYRg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=let_s_have_jane_s_ba&n=2) opened back up last week against the illegal and unconstitutional dictates from Governor Walz. Her popular restaurant had a HUGE target on its head from day one. Government bullies did not want her to succeed. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/jane_legal_fund?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=let_s_have_jane_s_ba&n=3) Jane is now being sued by Attorney General Keith Ellison, on behalf of Governor Walz' small business hit squad, the MN Dept of Health. Her liquor license has been revoked, buyer card removed and she currently has a restraining order placed on her business. All of this, for the sin of opening a legal business. Unbelievable!
## But guess what...SHE WILL NOT BACK DOWN!
We can't find this kind of courage at the Capitol. She's facing massive fines and even jail time with her defiance. Although when you ask Jane, the battle for our liberties is more important. What she is doing for all of Minnesota is amazing. I'm glad to call her a friend. **Jane is now facing a stack of legal fees, and I would like to ask you a favor. Please have Jane's back by supporting the[Jane Moss Legal Defense Fund](https://www.action4liberty.com/jane_legal_fund?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=let_s_have_jane_s_ba&n=4). Any donation size helps. It's the least we can do to help our hero.** Politicians at the Capitol may let us down in December, but our hero small business owners are the true warriors who will protect our liberties. Because of Jane's courage, 150 other bars & restaurants across the state plan to open up this Wednesday in defiance of Governor Walz as well. Freedom is starting to spread like brushfires.
## We MUST have Jane's back!
Please support the Jane Moss Legal Defense Fund and and share this email or the link with friends. You can post the link on Facebook or other social media accounts. Let's help Jane so we can continue to rise up against Governor Walz' tyrannical orders! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/jane_legal_fund?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=let_s_have_jane_s_ba&n=5 "Support Jane Moss Legal Fund") [Support Jane Moss Legal Fund](https://www.action4liberty.com/jane_legal_fund?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=let_s_have_jane_s_ba&n=6)
---
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=let_s_have_jane_s_ba&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=let_s_have_jane_s_ba&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=let_s_have_jane_s_ba&n=9), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janos=20Marton?=
subject: To our supporters, thank you for everything. The fight continues.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANOS MARTON FOR DISTRICT ATTORNEY
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=6084b59d2e&e=7758ed002e)
---
| | [ ](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=ca03469fea&e=7758ed002e)
---
| Dear Peter, I launched this campaign because policing and prisons aren’t the answer to society’s problems, and because it’s time to invest directly in the people and communities most harmed by mass incarceration. We are incredibly proud of the way we’ve organized around that vision during an immensely challenging year. **Unfortunately, at this moment I am no longer able to continue my campaign for Manhattan District Attorney.****I wanted you to be the first to understand why we came to that difficult decision: ** Too often in politics, “support” is measured by the amount of money raised, rather than metrics like the number of donors or volunteers, let alone the strength of ideas. While our campaign received more that 3,150 donations from more than 2,000 donors—with an average contribution of $50—our lack of large donations from rich donors put us at a disadvantage, especially since our race has no matching funds. (Under the city’s matching fund program, we would have been eligible for $500,000.) Given the political implications of our fundraising disadvantage, at this time we do not have a viable path to victory. While we have the energy to press on, I cannot ask our team and supporters to continue devoting themselves to a race we cannot win. I’ve denounced the role of money in our politics for my whole career, and investigated its negative impact in New York, most notably as a special counsel to the Moreland Commission to Investigate Public Corruption. Right now, the maximum donation in the Manhattan DA’s race is $37,000, an obscene amount. My hope, from seeing our campaign finance system up close, is that the state legislature will reform the campaign finance laws in New York DA races, especially given the need to keep District Attorneys from undue influence. While this is a difficult day, we also exit this race with much to be proud of.
---
|
* We released **[nine policy papers](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=61b4e93541&e=7758ed002e)** on reforming our criminal legal system, more than any other candidate. These policies were bold, designed with the input of directly impacted people and other experts, and often became the gold standard for the race, such as a commitment to cut the Manhattan jail population by 80%, cap sentences at 20 years, and abolish the Office of the Special Narcotics Prosecutor—all policies endorsed by leading criminal justice organizations and other candidates.
* We were the first campaign to call for cutting the NYPD budget by $1 billion, rallying with community groups and organizing 50 City Council candidates to sign on to that pledge.
* We lived our values as a campaign. We built our team around people of color, including a formerly incarcerated organizer. We paid our interns. We centered directly impacted people in all of our policies.
* We held dozens of events, highlighting the work of community leaders on issues like gun violence, COVID in prisons, and police accountability.
* We built a powerful, volunteer-driven organizing program. More than 300 volunteers knocked on thousands of NYCHA doors (pre-COVID), called 100,000 people, texted nearly 200,000, and direct-messaged 18,000, making 6,000 positive IDs along the way. This outreach focused on investing in communities and moving past police & prisons to solve society’s problems. We are so grateful to every volunteer who supported this campaign. Thank you for building with us.

---
| [ ](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=5d96eec8cf&e=7758ed002e)
---
| I will not be endorsing another candidate at this time. For nearly a year a half, we advanced a vision for transforming the criminal legal system based on my track record of fighting for criminal justice reform, my experience in leadership, and my specific vision for transformative policies. In deciding which of the remaining candidates to support, I hope that you consider who can inspire historically marginalized communities with a new vision for justice, and who has the demonstrated track record and leadership skills to implement such a vision. For me, no one has yet met that bar. But given how much this city means to me, I am certain to spend some of my energy in the coming months supporting people for various other offices who share my values and offer hope to their communities. Finally, I want to thank the people who have inspired me during the past 18 months. **My amazing team of staff and interns. **
---
| [ ](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=eca0ed5ddf&e=7758ed002e)
---
| The thousands of people who stood up for this campaign and lent their political support, volunteer time, small donations, and energy. And most importantly, the people who are out in the streets, fighting for their neighborhoods every single day. I’ve met incredible Black and brown community leaders, many of whom are formerly incarcerated, who, without big government contracts or fancy offices, are doing the hard work of reducing violence and providing opportunities in neighborhoods so many elected officials have given up on. I will continue to be an ally and supporter to those people and organizations. The hardest part of this is knowing that we are not going to be able to implement our vision for transformational justice, and the real lives that will affect. There was never going to be one person who could single-handedly end mass incarceration or bring true justice to our legal system, but hopefully this campaign has been a step forward in that direction. And the work of building a more just city and country does not end for me or anyone on my team today. As long as the march for justice continues, we will continue to stand up for people, and stand up to power.

**Janos Marton**
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Peter, I launched this campaign because policing and prisons aren’t the answer to society’s problems, and because it’s time to invest directly in the people and communities most harmed by mass incarceration. We are incredibly proud of the way we’ve organized around that vision during an immensely challenging year. Unfortunately, at this moment I am no longer able to continue my campaign for Manhattan District Attorney.I wanted you to be the first to understand why we came to that difficult decision: Too often in politics, “support” is measured by the amount of money raised, rather than metrics like the number of donors or volunteers, let alone the strength of ideas. While our campaign received more that 3,150 donations from more than 2,000 donors—with an average contribution of $50—our lack of large donations from rich donors put us at a disadvantage, especially since our race has no matching funds. (Under the city’s matching fund program, we would have been eligible for $500,000.) Given the political implications of our fundraising disadvantage, at this time we do not have a viable path to victory. While we have the energy to press on, I cannot ask our team and supporters to continue devoting themselves to a race we cannot win. I’ve denounced the role of money in our politics for my whole career, and investigated its negative impact in New York, most notably as a special counsel to the Moreland Commission to Investigate Public Corruption. Right now, the maximum donation in the Manhattan DA’s race is $37,000, an obscene amount. My hope, from seeing our campaign finance system up close, is that the state legislature will reform the campaign finance laws in New York DA races, especially given the need to keep District Attorneys from undue influence. While this is a difficult day, we also exit this race with much to be proud of. | We released on reforming our criminal legal system, more than any other candidate. These policies were bold, designed with the input of directly impacted people and other experts, and often became the gold standard for the race, such as a commitment to cut the Manhattan jail population by 80%, cap sentences at 20 years, and abolish the Office of the Special Narcotics Prosecutor—all policies endorsed by leading criminal justice organizations and other candidates. We were the first campaign to call for cutting the NYPD budget by $1 billion, rallying with community groups and organizing 50 City Council candidates to sign on to that pledge. We lived our values as a campaign. We built our team around people of color, including a formerly incarcerated organizer. We paid our interns. We centered directly impacted people in all of our policies. We held dozens of events, highlighting the work of community leaders on issues like gun violence, COVID in prisons, and police accountability. We built a powerful, volunteer-driven organizing program. More than 300 volunteers knocked on thousands of NYCHA doors (pre-COVID), called 100,000 people, texted nearly 200,000, and direct-messaged 18,000, making 6,000 positive IDs along the way. This outreach focused on investing in communities and moving past police & prisons to solve society’s problems. We are so grateful to every volunteer who supported this campaign. Thank you for building with us. | | I will not be endorsing another candidate at this time. For nearly a year a half, we advanced a vision for transforming the criminal legal system based on my track record of fighting for criminal justice reform, my experience in leadership, and my specific vision for transformative policies. In deciding which of the remaining candidates to support, I hope that you consider who can inspire historically marginalized communities with a new vision for justice, and who has the demonstrated track record and leadership skills to implement such a vision. For me, no one has yet met that bar. But given how much this city means to me, I am certain to spend some of my energy in the coming months supporting people for various other offices who share my values and offer hope to their communities. Finally, I want to thank the people who have inspired me during the past 18 months. My amazing team of staff and interns. | | The thousands of people who stood up for this campaign and lent their political support, volunteer time, small donations, and energy. And most importantly, the people who are out in the streets, fighting for their neighborhoods every single day. I’ve met incredible Black and brown community leaders, many of whom are formerly incarcerated, who, without big government contracts or fancy offices, are doing the hard work of reducing violence and providing opportunities in neighborhoods so many elected officials have given up on. I will continue to be an ally and supporter to those people and organizations. The hardest part of this is knowing that we are not going to be able to implement our vision for transformational justice, and the real lives that will affect. There was never going to be one person who could single-handedly end mass incarceration or bring true justice to our legal system, but hopefully this campaign has been a step forward in that direction. And the work of building a more just city and country does not end for me or anyone on my team today. As long as the march for justice continues, we will continue to stand up for people, and stand up to power. Janos Marton | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY JANOS MARTON FOR DISTRICT ATTORNEY Our mailing address is:** Janos Marton for Manhattan District Attorney212 E 25th St Apt 12Brooklyn, NY 11226-6211 Want to change how you receive these emails? | **EARLY VOTING STARTS TODAY**
---
| Folks, Early voting starts** [ today](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=afe687a60f&e=02cd889ad3)****.** There may never be another election where a vote carries so much weight. Our freedoms, the Senate majority, and the soul of America hang in the balance. Who gains control of the Senate on January 5 determines where we head as a nation – _continue on the pathway of freedom or diverge down the road to socialism_. **The accomplishments and results of the last four years must be protected**. If we sit this election out, we risk dismantling the historic economic growth, military restoration, and unprecedented foreign affairs milestones we’ve reached under the leadership of President Trump. In light of **early voting beginning today** , Team Perdue released a new ad and web video to encourage Georgians to vote early. To help us make sure EVERY Republican hears our message, share these videos with your neighbors, friends, and followers.

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: I'm so glad you're with us. Let's get to work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
|
---
| | Together, we can elect even more pro-choice Democratic women. [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118d343b/24c69fd9/36bfee340/1853e2bd/2279546041/VEsH/?g=DhVTQlDdY9BX2OrarUJBWMA "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160520_email_welcome?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020&source=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020") Welcome, Peter!

I'm so glad you've joined our community.

If you're here because you're passionate about electing pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot and across the country, you're in the right place.

If you're here because you like winning and igniting change, you are _really_ in the right place.

At EMILY's List, we raise money to help our candidates _win_ , and we're good at it -- we've helped over 1,300 women win their races at every level of government from city council to the Senate.

**[If you're ready to get to work, make a donation of $3 or more today to support pro-choice Democratic women running for office.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118d343b/24c69fd9/36bfee340/1853e2bf/2279546041/VEsE/?g=DhVTQlDdY9BX2OrarUJBWMA "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160520_email_welcome?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+If+yoursquore+ready+to+get+to+work+make+&utm_campaign=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020&source=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020")**

EMILY's List started in 1985 with a dozen women, led by Ellen Malcolm, asking their friends to support pro-choice Democratic women candidates.

We've been growing ever since: You've just joined a community that is now over five million members strong, and together, we've raised more than $700 million to help our candidates win.

What do we spend it on? Recruiting and training candidates, supporting strong campaigns, researching the issues that impact women and families, and turning out women voters to the polls.

The formula works: Since our founding in 1985, we've helped elect women to the Senate, the House, to governorships around the country, hundreds of state and local offices, and as of 2020 -- the White House. We are especially proud that nearly half of the candidates we've helped elect to Congress have been women of color.

**Become a part of EMILY's List history and make a donation today to help elect pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Smash-Glass-Ceilings](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118d343b/24c69fd9/36bfee340/1853e2b8/2279546041/VEsF/?g=DhVTQlDdY9BX2OrarUJBWMA "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160520_email_welcome?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgSmashGlassCeilin&utm_campaign=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020&source=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020")**

I can't wait to work together.

Thank you for joining us,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118d343b/24c69fd9/36bfee340/1853e2ba/2279546041/VEsC/?g=DhVTQlDdY9BX2OrarUJBWMA "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160520_email_welcome?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020&source=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020")

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118d343b/24c69fd9/36bfee340/1853e2b4/2279546041/VEsD/?g=DhVTQlDdY9BX2OrarUJBWMA "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020&source=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118d343b/24c69fd9/36bfee340/1853e2b6/2279546041/VEsA/?g=DhVTQlDdY9BX2OrarUJBWMA "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020&source=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118d343b/24c69fd9/36bfee340/1853e2b0/2279546041/VEsB/?g=DhVTQlDdY9BX2OrarUJBWMA "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020&source=WREFE_digital_email_welcome2Dec2020"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: U.S. Pays Costa Rica to Hire More Female Cops as Police at Home Get Defunded
body:
While police departments across the United States are being defunded to appease leftists, the federal government is dedicating hundreds of thousands of dollars to advance “gender equality” in the “police forces” of a Latin American nation.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 14, 2020
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52258&L=21495&F=H&) | **[U.S. Pays Costa Rica to Hire More Female Cops as Police at Home Get Defunded](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52258&L=21495&F=H&)** While police departments across the United States are being defunded to appease leftists, the federal government is dedicating hundreds of thousands of dollars to advance “gender equality” in the “police forces” of a Latin American nation. It is a difficult foreign grant to swallow as local law enforcement agencies nationwide suffer through major budget cuts at the request of the increasingly powerful Black Lives Matter (BLM) movement. The money will flow through the State Department’s Bureau of International Narcotics and Law Enforcement Affairs (INL), a broad effort funded by American taxpayers to fight crime, counter production and trafficking of illicit drugs and build sound criminal justice systems in foreign countries. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52258&L=21495&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52258&L=21432&F=H&) | **[Ex-Con Hired by D.C. as Violence Interrupter Arrested, Charged with Murder](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52258&L=21432&F=H&)** In a curious twist, a “reformed” criminal hired by the District of Columbia’s chief legal officer to help curb violence has been arrested and charged with murder. The case involves a taxpayer-funded public safety program known as Cure the Streets launched by D.C. Attorney General Karl Racine to reduce gun violence by treating it as a disease that can be interrupted and stopped from spreading. Cure the Streets typically hires men and women with criminal histories as violence interrupters because they know first-hand about the challenges that residents of crime-infested communities live with. Racine, who was reelected to a second term in 2018, says the transformed criminals hired by his program perform community-driven public safety work that can avoid using police. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52258&L=21432&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52258&L=21460&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaHMtYmF0dGxlLXdpdGgtYmFsbG90LWZyYXVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTQxNjA5MTY=) | **[Judicial Watch Confronts the Election Crisis](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52258&L=21460&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaHMtYmF0dGxlLXdpdGgtYmFsbG90LWZyYXVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTQxNjA5MTY=)** In October, we published a groundbreaking study analyzing data that showed there are at least 1.8 million of these “ghost voters” spread across more than 350 counties in 29 states. The data revealed eight states where the number of registered voters actually exceeds 100% of eligible voting-age citizens in the state! That dubious distinction goes to Alaska, Colorado, Maine, Maryland, Michigan, New Jersey, Rhode Island, and Vermont. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52258&L=21460&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaHMtYmF0dGxlLXdpdGgtYmFsbG90LWZyYXVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMTQxNjA5MTY=)

clean_body: While police departments across the United States are being defunded to appease leftists, the federal government is dedicating hundreds of thousands of dollars to advance “gender equality” in the “police forces” of a Latin American nation. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 14, 2020 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | While police departments across the United States are being defunded to appease leftists, the federal government is dedicating hundreds of thousands of dollars to advance “gender equality” in the “police forces” of a Latin American nation. It is a difficult foreign grant to swallow as local law enforcement agencies nationwide suffer through major budget cuts at the request of the increasingly powerful Black Lives Matter (BLM) movement. The money will flow through the State Department’s Bureau of International Narcotics and Law Enforcement Affairs (INL), a broad effort funded by American taxpayers to fight crime, counter production and trafficking of illicit drugs and build sound criminal justice systems in foreign countries. ---|--- | | | | | In a curious twist, a “reformed” criminal hired by the District of Columbia’s chief legal officer to help curb violence has been arrested and charged with murder. The case involves a taxpayer-funded public safety program known as Cure the Streets launched by D.C. Attorney General Karl Racine to reduce gun violence by treating it as a disease that can be interrupted and stopped from spreading. Cure the Streets typically hires men and women with criminal histories as violence interrupters because they know first-hand about the challenges that residents of crime-infested communities live with. Racine, who was reelected to a second term in 2018, says the transformed criminals hired by his program perform community-driven public safety work that can avoid using police. ---|--- | | | | = | = In October, we published a groundbreaking study analyzing data that showed there are at least 1.8 million of these “ghost voters” spread across more than 350 counties in 29 states. The data revealed eight states where the number of registered voters actually exceeds 100% of eligible voting-age citizens in the state! That dubious distinction goes to Alaska, Colorado, Maine, Maryland, Michigan, New Jersey, Rhode Island, and Vermont. = ---|--- | | | | = | = With President Trump’s pardon, General Flynn is now a free man – after years of what Fitton has described as “abuse and harassment.” “They knew he [Flynn] was innocent, yet they prosecuted him anyway and abused his civil rights.” While the Justice Department tried to end the case against Flynn, Judge Sullivan “has been abusing his power in a way that is simply shocking from a federal judge,” Fitton continued. “He’s obviously hoping that a Biden admin will come in and let him make a political prisoner out of General Flynn.” = ---|--- | | | == The Daily Caller The Daily Caller News Foundation and Judicial Watch had sued the State Department for the same documents, though they were almost entirely redacted. The unredacted versions released on Thursday provide details of information that Steele provided State Department officials regarding Russia and Ukraine. == == National Review Apparently, some Trump supporters on Parler came to the conclusion that Barr had been a “Deep State” operative all along — including the president’s longtime friend, Roger Stone. Fox Business Channel host Lou Dobbs fumed, “For the attorney general of the United States to make that statement, he is either a liar or a fool or both. He may be, uh, perhaps compromised. He may be simply unprincipled. Or he may be personally distraught or ill.” Tom Fitton of Judicial Watch declares that Barr is “protecting Hillary Clinton” and trying to shut down all of his organization’s lawsuits. And over at Gateway Pundit, Jim Hoft declares: “The only people the FBI and DOJ target are patriotic conservative Americans who want things better for their country and for their children’s future . . . AG Barr had a good scam going but now it’s over. We now know definitively what he is all about. He is just another crooked swamp creature.” == == Forbes Tom Fitton, the president of the conservative advocacy group Judicial Watch, told CNN his organization is against the mandate, saying it “may violate the law for Nasdaq to seemingly require a discriminatory quota system for race and gender.” In September, Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit aimed at blocking the California law. == | CLIPS = TWEETS | | | | | = ---|---|--- LEADERSHIP? body:

**_Now I know you 've been getting a ton of emails, so I don't need to tell you these races are coming down to the wire. And it's not going to be pretty, but we've gotta save our Majority._**

**[That's why we need you to step up and help us gather all the resources so we can finish strong and hold the Senate. clean_body: SUPPORTER STATUS: DONATION:== AMOUNT SHORT OF GOAL: $236,319 Mid-Month Deadline == Friend, I've just spoken with our team on the ground in Georgia, and we're STILL short of our mid-month goal! The Georgia runoffs next month will be extremely close, and we must have the resources to finish this fight in the home stretch. Can I count on your help? This is make-or-break, and I can't believe we're this far behind when so much is at stake. == We need to reach our goal before the deadline so we can finalize our Get Out the Vote strategy these last 4 weeks. Update Early voting starts today, and we need resources to get our message out fast! Now I know you 've been getting a ton of emails, so I don't need to tell you these races are coming down to the wire. And it's not going to be pretty, but we've gotta save our Majority. == **== These elections decide our country's future and we can't afford to lose! == Thank you, John Kennedy ==** If you agree that President Trump and Republicans are MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, text MAGA to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! subject: Bringing an end to gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/C4YdKnTVT2AqHXcKi2LaJyS0PTu0tJOQQ9wb6SYbVho=/78oFtTY3KMvwyjev-BJcIabgnnXKxzoo5IsBAuQcBmU=)
Today marks eight years since a gunman took the innocent lives of 26 students and teachers at Sandy Hook Elementary.
An immeasurable tragedy like Sandy Hook deserves time for mourning and reflection, but it also warrants _**action.**_ We must do _everything_ in our power to ensure that **NO** community has to go through what the families of Newtown, Connecticut went through 8 years ago.
_But, what does action look like? _**It looks common-sense gun reform. **For that to happen, however, we'll need bipartisanship from the Senate.
We'll need Democratic _and_ Republican Senators to come together and prioritize the**safety** of _ _ Americans _. _The House of Representatives has _already_ passed comprehensive gun measures, but now the Senate must do the same. We need to show Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell just how much the American people support common-sense gun reform.
[**Will you join me by demanding the Senate take action on gun violence by adding your name to our petition?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/C4YdKnTVT2AqHXcKi2LaJyS0PTu0tJOQQ9wb6SYbVho=/TQjVVYr0uU03fuJT0_B375uXieGljWacGrNgp0_8tK8=)

Thanks for taking action,
_\-- Linda S anchez_

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: JOINT STATEMENT FROM LOEFFLER, PERDUE ON OPPOSITION TO RENAMING ATLANTA BRAVES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, DECEMBER 14, 2020
> JOINT STATEMENT FROM LOEFFLER, PERDUE ON OPPOSITION TO RENAMING ATLANTA BRAVES
ATLANTA - Following Cleveland's decision to [rename the Indians](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YnuYQbbfebjYcheTmRkBIwRhvwqCXGGbYYVj_xd_yJv0myJAbtSjU69K5PqRYVZlgd1XGoaOYF4-HlVQkfO_47GqnbTsAuu4I6ladWJZHAF47hdl4bYme3nsO0nZHp7Gl3kNbi4n6UAF4N2j8aNYt_0PeThEI-51D5PbbJFEmdWGKvd67x8j8vb2AxpUcAuNOmcbdSzv28-jnlVPU3IHECojoqK0htW_IViVDvPJJJwFEHqJVcnc5KPcwh4DOHtVYBH-WoP5rBDI3wpOVBejBQ==&c=_ohFgdN8ZKdvdswNFnGtG441OqttrDWp0DxWcmOD31OcxJDmwM9gbQ==&ch=_aamEC1LUrOS0QFMX_3r3Tw9IONzzK-6LJCJOe4SNkA8KjazBEpvKw==) baseball team, Senators Loeffler and Perdue issued the following statement opposing any effort to rename the Atlanta Braves:
"We adamantly oppose any effort to rename the Atlanta Braves, one of our state's most storied and successful sports franchises. Not only are the Braves a Georgia institution -- with a history spanning 54 years in Atlanta -- they're an American institution. The Braves' name honors our nation's Native American heritage, which should not be erased -- and under no circumstances should one of the most celebrated teams in sports cave to the demands of the cancel culture and the radical left."
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YnuYQbbfebjYcheTmRkBIwRhvwqCXGGbYYVj_xd_yJv0myJAbtSjUzoj1SvUYluLsrx4O7LzdwuvCyndS3wIegp1is4HSFFWCMo6BLwqh2eNUrEgwrm4SxfgsG2b9Ul-cYxgGWkqaVD75eRl_zWllOGUT6Q4DJ9q&c=_ohFgdN8ZKdvdswNFnGtG441OqttrDWp0DxWcmOD31OcxJDmwM9gbQ==&ch=_aamEC1LUrOS0QFMX_3r3Tw9IONzzK-6LJCJOe4SNkA8KjazBEpvKw==)
---
|

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Turning point
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Today is a turning point for Rhode Island and for our country in the fight against COVID-19. At 1 p.m., the state's first COVID-19 vaccine was administered to Dr. Christian Arbelaez. Dr. Arbelaez is a Colombian immigrant, the son of a housekeeper, and a first-generation college graduate. He did his residency at Brown University and has been working throughout this pandemic on the frontlines in the emergency room at Rhode Island Hospital.
After receiving the vaccine, Dr. Arbelaez shared how excited and thankful he is for this moment in our pandemic response, saying, "As a person of color, as a Colombian, as a Latino, as a doctor, I want to share this message with my colleagues and the communities of color. I want to ask you to please get the vaccine so you can keep yourself and your family healthy. We will stop the spread in our communities if you get vaccinated."
We still have a long way to go before distributing this life-saving vaccine to everyone in Rhode Island, but this is a historic step toward defeating COVID-19. Our healthcare workers have been working around-the-clock to keep us safe from this virus, and we should all be heartened to know that they will be protected in-turn.
It will still be a few months before the vaccine is widely available, but today's vaccinations are a major turning point. You can read more about the vaccine, including our distribution plan, at [health.ri.gov/covid/vaccine](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IojNpMKcX6U8HmGsoR0wMnSjEwTSnx8Ufmch-nRyM_BaRIgMusJT0BADBgRWK6W6oqVmvYKfYsYPzOWt1tI4LUkkaRAWUXzfhljEU9__UHUbkYnKc_WLPV7jkDMtcMDrprx927GEMHTlYm86ixBR2aNwnK9oxqcO&c=sCy6v8A7-M-zej3F5CaKDWI7nFr2wXKoOnubkG5_2h9gcsQHI_aoSQ==&ch=SGktljvsy8w5kWbgmJhjlGWmwlK_TPJ98JAVpMXdKAqMO5ee-Vaetg==).
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IojNpMKcX6U8HmGsoR0wMnSjEwTSnx8Ufmch-nRyM_BaRIgMusJT0BADBgRWK6W6YOLDd82GhzHlEvbnzsTdSfMu3Kdrdk0ixBVqBjGsiV1EM__FDdragJxKeYS-nkOrMrpfBqynD3ub3y-JCYyNpWFKSk_mlnbGdJ5R97TlU0JFi0QpFb0s6a5OvbKu12zkinZ8pAgyZkquAyNYDhTTuStaRIVZmcIMMPW1LjsVVlRT4rQrHgfWi3b-sHvhH0QsWZYKuQHUq_2hMLYHni9GwQWchB5b89DCxCTSmSC5s2IAidcQGlAETm61AGe2Cn8CrTOimU9xUK8=&c=sCy6v8A7-M-zej3F5CaKDWI7nFr2wXKoOnubkG5_2h9gcsQHI_aoSQ==&ch=SGktljvsy8w5kWbgmJhjlGWmwlK_TPJ98JAVpMXdKAqMO5ee-Vaetg==).

At 1 p.m., the state's first COVID-19 vaccine was administered to Dr. Christian Arbelaez. Dr. Arbelaez is a Colombian immigrant, the son of a housekeeper, and a first-generation college graduate. He did his residency at Brown University and has been working throughout this pandemic on the frontlines in the emergency room at Rhode Island Hospital. After receiving the vaccine, Dr. Arbelaez shared how excited and thankful he is for this moment in our pandemic response, saying, "As a person of color, as a Colombian, as a Latino, as a doctor, I want to share this message with my colleagues and the communities of color. I want to ask you to please get the vaccine so you can keep yourself and your family healthy. We will stop the spread in our communities if you get vaccinated." We still have a long way to go before distributing this life-saving vaccine to everyone in Rhode Island, but this is a historic step toward defeating COVID-19. Our healthcare workers have been working around-the-clock to keep us safe from this virus, and we should all be heartened to know that they will be protected in-turn. It will still be a few months before the vaccine is widely available, but today's vaccinations are a major turning point. You can read more about the vaccine, including our distribution plan, at ==. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: Chuck Smith
subject: Help a Black Conservative Fight
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)
---

Hi Peter,

My name is Chuck Smith. I'm a former Navy JAG Commander, a Black conservative, and I wanted to write you today about doing something POSITIVE to help the President's agenda!

The Democrats are outspending our two U.S. Senate candidates in Georgia so that Chuck Schumer can cram Socialism down our throats next year. We need to step up to stop him, [we need to pitch in with some help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)!

Things are difficult right now. The polls in Georgia - if you believe that sort of thing- have turned against us. The far Left is beating us with intensity- we need to kick it up a notch!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)
---

_We have just a couple of weeks to go. Where are the patriots???_

Thank goodness, groups like Drain the DC Swamp PAC are stepping up. We have already spent nearly $100,000 on getting out conservatives for the Georgia Senate runoffs, and more is needed.

I'm a 27 year Navy veteran. I know the value of air support! [That's why I'm writing you on behalf of Drain the DC Swamp PAC. ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)We need to flood the theater with air cover for our pro-Trump, conservative Senate candidates!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)
---

**We are being outspent. Aren't you tired of good candidates losing because the Dems have the backing of a handful of limousine liberals from New York and California???**

These radicals will spend whatever they have to for their causes. They have nothing but contempt for us and our values. Their candidates will work to crucify us if they win!

You don't EVER win by losing- We saw this here in Virginia. [That means we must fight harder to make sure it doesn't happen to Georgia.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)
---

_At the debate, Warnock didn’t deny he wants to eliminate cash bail and empty the prisons. He promoted the false narrative that police disproportionately kill blacks more than whites suspected of the same crimes.**When Loeffler warned that Warnock would raise Georgians’ taxes to fund the Green New Deal and a government takeover of private health insurance, he didn’t deny that either.**_

_Most telling, Warnock refused to answer whether he’d support the Democratic Party’s most radical, far-reaching scheme: packing the Supreme Court. “I’m not really focused on it,” he told the debate moderators._

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)
---

Drain the DC Swamp PAC spent heavily in 2020 in key swing states to elect President Trump. We will also spend heavily to support the America First agenda in the U.S. Senate-** [And for that, we need YOUR help!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)**

_Remember 2009-2010, the last time the Dems had full control over the Federal Government? _

**__It was Barack Obama's rush toward Socialism. It woke me up, and many others as well. We can't let that happen again!__**

This may be that our last chance to stop Schumer from having control of the Senate!

We MUST win two of two races in Georgia. It's a big push, but we can do it. [Will you help us?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)

Your contribution is so crucial. [Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw)\- that Socialists are not welcome in the U.S. Senate!

Join the President, the Georgia Senators and me in fighting back against Soros and Bloomberg! [Help us push forward and win in Georgia](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw), for America!

God Bless America,
[ ](secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1)
---
|
---

Chuck Smith
Virginia Patriot
U.S. Navy JAG Corps (ret.)
Constitutional Conservative

P.S. The ONLY firewall we have against the Socialists is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. [Donate right now to help us save the Senate.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=j4CpHthFUrcqI4c&b=DvjhPCg5HQSUpI0SQAO1Sw) We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, My name is Chuck Smith. I'm a former Navy JAG Commander, a Black conservative, and I wanted to write you today about doing something POSITIVE to help the President's agenda! The Democrats are outspending our two U.S. Senate candidates in Georgia so that Chuck Schumer can cram Socialism down our throats next year. We need to step up to stop him, ! Things are difficult right now. The polls in Georgia - if you believe that sort of thing- have turned against us. The far Left is beating us with intensity- we need to kick it up a notch! We have just a couple of weeks to go. Where are the patriots??? Thank goodness, groups like Drain the DC Swamp PAC are stepping up. We have already spent nearly $100,000 on getting out conservatives for the Georgia Senate runoffs, and more is needed. I'm a 27 year Navy veteran. I know the value of air support! need to flood the theater with air cover for our pro-Trump, conservative Senate candidates! We are being outspent. Aren't you tired of good candidates losing because the Dems have the backing of a handful of limousine liberals from New York and California??? These radicals will spend whatever they have to for their causes. They have nothing but contempt for us and our values. Their candidates will work to crucify us if they win! You don't EVER win by losing- We saw this here in Virginia. At the debate, Warnock didn’t deny he wants to eliminate cash bail and empty the prisons. He promoted the false narrative that police disproportionately kill blacks more than whites suspected of the same crimes.When Loeffler warned that Warnock would raise Georgians’ taxes to fund the Green New Deal and a government takeover of private health insurance, he didn’t deny that either. Most telling, Warnock refused to answer whether he’d support the Democratic Party’s most radical, far-reaching scheme: packing the Supreme Court. “I’m not really focused on it,” he told the debate moderators. Drain the DC Swamp PAC spent heavily in 2020 in key swing states to elect President Trump. We will also spend heavily to support the America First agenda in the U.S. Senate- Remember 2009-2010, the last time the Dems had full control over the Federal Government? It was Barack Obama's rush toward Socialism. It woke me up, and many others as well. We can't let that happen again! This may be that our last chance to stop Schumer from having control of the Senate! We MUST win two of two races in Georgia. It's a big push, but we can do it. Your contribution is so crucial. \- that Socialists are not welcome in the U.S. Senate! Join the President, the Georgia Senators and me in fighting back against Soros and Bloomberg! , for America! God Bless America, secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1 | Chuck Smith Virginia Patriot U.S. Navy JAG Corps (ret.) Constitutional Conservative P.S. The ONLY firewall we have against the Socialists is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. 5 Halifax Ct Marlton NJ 08053 USA
