name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: BREAKING: America’s first Coronavirus vaccine doses are administered!
body:
Today, medical workers administered the first COVID-19 vaccine doses in the United States–a feat that earlier this year... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a4dc62dfdd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 14, 2020
---
| | |
# **BREAKING: America’s first Coronavirus vaccine doses are administered! **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c3df37342d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Today, medical workers** administered the first COVID-19 vaccine doses in the United States–a feat that earlier this year many experts claimed would take a miracle.

**“This spring** , experts predicted that a vaccine was at least a year or year-and-a-half away,” Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar said. “Yet, within a year, we have one vaccine authorized—millions of doses being shipped—and another vaccine under review by the FDA.”

**Accomplishing the “impossible”** has defined President Trump’s Administration. When the Coronavirus came to our shores, the President cut Washington red tape and mobilized both the public and private sectors to develop a safe, effective vaccine. The nationwide manufacturing and distribution systems created under Operation Warp Speed constitute the largest mobilization of American industry since World War II.

**As President Trump says** , this pandemic started in China—but America will end it.

🎬 [**WATCH: We can see light at the end of the tunnel**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b0c64cb24&e=3ee4985eea)

**On top of clearing unnecessary barriers** to get a vaccine to the American people in record time, President Trump just signed an executive order to ensure that U.S. citizens are the first in line for it. President Trump always puts our country first. The delivery of the Coronavirus vaccine is no different.

**None of this success** would be possible without both our courageous frontline medical workers and our incredible United States military. Today is a momentous victory for all Americans—and the rest of the world—in defeating this terrible virus.

📖 [**Secretary Azar: The end of this pandemic is in sight**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4be7a58ef5&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [**Dr. Slaoui: Within 3 months, we expect 100 million vaccine doses**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a893e80298&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9ebf8ea7b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c727f531c1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=20277a5722)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Randy=20Feenstra?=
subject: We're getting to work!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| It’s been a while since I last reached out, so I thought I would touch base and give you an update on how things have been going.

The past couple of weeks I’ve been in Washington for new member orientation, learning the ins-and-outs, dodging swamp monsters, and laying the groundwork for a productive year to come. It was a great start - I was elected the Regional Representative to the Republican Policy Committee, began building solid relationships with the other incoming representatives, and strategized with Representative-elects Hinson and Miller-Meeks on what we can prioritize to start delivering for Iowans right away.

Additionally, I was able to meet with Chief Agriculture Negotiator Greg Doud to talk about agriculture and trade, advocated strongly for other states to implement Iowa’s voter ID system so we can crush election fraud, and laid out to my colleagues how we were able to balance the budget here in Iowa and how we can do it for our country. I’m glad to say that we have an outstanding class of incoming representatives that are hungry to get to work and eager to start delivering results.

All in all, I’m pleased to report that it’s been a productive few weeks. There’s still much to get done, but knowing that we’re in this together has kept me optimistic and fired up! I’ll be sure to keep you in the loop once we hit the ground in January, but you can follow me on social media by clicking on the icons below to keep up with our progress and join the conversation - because we are government, together.
---
| | | | | | [](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=e6daace072&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---

---
| | [](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=2a8c25e25f&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| Thanks for your continued support and have a blessed holiday season!

-Randy
---
|
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
